# Token Logos

> Bybit 组件库中的加密货币 Token Logo，可直接通过 componentKey 引用
> Tags: token, logo, 币种, coin, crypto, 图标

**Total: 1289 tokens (942 with both light/dark variants)**

## Usage

Token logos are standalone COMPs. Use them as instances:

```jsonc
{
  "type": "instance",
  "componentKey": "KEY_FROM_TABLE_BELOW",
  "name": "BTC Logo",
  "width": 32, "height": 32
}
```

For Dark Mode pages, use the **dark** key. For Light Mode pages, use the **light** key.
If only one variant exists, use whichever is available.
